narrative:
Jackson 25 (precinct in Stark County) has 861 registered voters, with 44.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.3 percentage points.
